# Bee Connect Agency

> AI search optimization (AIO / GEO) for local service businesses in the Lehigh Valley and Berks County, Pennsylvania. We get small companies named and recommended inside AI answers from ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overviews — so when someone asks AI for the best service business near them, the client comes up first. We also add automated reviews, an AI chat assistant, and online booking so those AI-driven visitors turn into booked jobs.

Bee Connect Agency helps local, independent service businesses become the answer AI gives. We are based in the Lehigh Valley, PA. The first AI Visibility Audit is free and no-obligation; plans are simple and monthly.

## What we do

Start with a free AI Visibility Audit, then choose a simple monthly plan. No long contracts.

- **AI Visibility Audit (free, first one):** a one-page report showing exactly where a business is invisible to AI — plus proof that local competitors have the same gap. No charge to look.
- **Spark — Get Found ($99/month):** hand-built llms.txt; AI-crawler allow-rules (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended); LocalBusiness + FAQ + Service schema; Google Business Profile management; and a monthly AI-visibility report.
- **Buzz — Get Found + Reviews ($179/month):** everything in Spark, plus automated review collection and an AI chat assistant on the website that answers questions and captures leads 24/7. Most popular.
- **Hive — Full AI Front Desk ($279/month):** everything in Buzz, plus online booking and full lead capture — get found, get the lead, book the job.
- **Website build (from $750 one-time):** a fast, modern site with AI search built in. Waived with an annual plan.

## À la carte (individual tools, month to month)

Prefer to start small? Each tool is available on its own; most owners bundle into a plan above and pay less. Founding-client rates:

- **BeeBot AI Chat Assistant — $29/month:** a chat assistant on the site that answers questions and captures leads 24/7.
- **RepKit Reviews — $49/month:** automated review requests after each job, plus one inbox for Google, Yelp, and Facebook.
- **BookKit Online Booking — $49/month (plus a $99 one-time setup):** customers book the job themselves and track it; the owner manages everything from one dashboard.
- **Google Business Profile Management — $79/month:** the Google profile optimized, posted to, and monitored every month.
- **AI Visibility Audit — free (first one):** see exactly where AI can't find you before buying anything.

## Who we serve

Lehigh Valley and Berks County, PA service businesses: HVAC and plumbing, junk removal and hauling, roofing and contractors, tattoo studios, salons and barbershops, dental and medical, real estate, law and accounting, auto detailing, estate cleanouts, and mobile notary. The method also works in similar mid-size local markets.

## Why it matters

- ChatGPT has roughly 900 million weekly users (early 2026), up from about 300 million a year earlier.
- Google's AI Overviews reach billions of users each month.
- Pew Research (2025) found that when an AI summary appears, people click a website link about 8% of the time, versus 15% without one — the "answer" is increasingly the destination.
- A competitor's ad budget buys nothing inside an AI answer. AI recommends whoever is clearest, best-reviewed, and most machine-readable. The first business in a category to set this up tends to become the default answer.

## Proof of work

- BookKit — white-label online booking system (live demo): https://demos.beeconnectagency.com/bookkit/demo.html
- RepKit — reputation & review management hub (live demo): https://demos.beeconnectagency.com/repkit/demo.html
- BookKit industry samples — BookKit themed live for 15 service industries; pick one to open its sample (live demo): https://demos.beeconnectagency.com/bookkit/industries.html
- BeeBot — white-label AI chat assistant that answers customer questions and captures leads 24/7 (try it live on this site).
